Who We Are

Singapore's Neighbourhood
Provision Partner

Founded in 1994, Ah Yeow Provision Supply (亚耀土产供应) has been a cornerstone of Singapore's food supply chain for over three decades. What began as a humble provision shop at Serangoon has grown into one of Singapore's most trusted wholesale suppliers of Chinese dried goods and specialty food products.

We carry an extraordinary selection of Chinese food supplies — from dried seafood and preserved vegetables to old-school tidbits and festive provisions that you simply won't find on supermarket shelves. Whether you run a restaurant, coffee shop, caterer, or hotel kitchen, we have what you need.

Wholesale Pricing
Competitive bulk rates for business clients
Specialist Stock
Rare & traditional products not found in supermarkets
Reliable Supply
Consistent stock replenishment you can count on
Personal Service
Decades of expertise from our experienced team
Get in Touch

What We Carry

Our Product Categories

Wholesale provisions for restaurants, coffee shops, hawker stalls and caterers. Over 1,000 products — from bulk rice and dried seafood to spices, sauces and soup ingredients.

Rice (Bulk & Wholesale)

AAA Golden Eagle Thai fragrant rice, Thailand organic brown rice, Flying Man crystalline rice — available in 25kg sacks. Jasmine rice, glutinous rice and rice flour also in stock.

Dried Seafood

Indonesia ikan bilis (small & large), dried shrimp (虾米), premium meat shrimp, Japan dried scallops (干贝), Japan whitebait, seaweed (紫菜) and canned abalone in brine.

Dried Mushrooms & Fungi

Japan small flower mushroom (日本小花菇), shredded shiitake (香菇丝), white fungus (白木耳), mini black fungus (小木耳) — for soups, braised dishes and zi char.

Spices & Seasonings

Star anise (八角), cinnamon (桂皮), cloves (丁香), black cardamon (草果), BABA curry powder, belacan (峇拉煎), white pepper powder, Ajinomoto MSG (味精) — essential for hawker and restaurant kitchens.

Condiments & Cooking Sauces

Maggi stock (汤), Lao Gan Ma (老干妈), Cheong Chan cooking caramel, A1 Ba Ku Teh soup spices, EL chili paste, Heng's crispy fish/prawn chili, Golden Carp kaya, cooking lime juice.

Soup Ingredients & Herbs

Red dates (红枣), dried lily (百合), daylily (金针), Chinese yam (淮山), goji berries (枸杞), ginkgo nuts (白果), lotus seeds (莲子), assam skin — ready for BKT, tong sui and herbal soups.

Noodles, Tofu Skin & Dry Goods

A1 rice vermicelli, Egret Brans rice sticks, Shandong China vermicelli, vegetable noodles, square & broken tofu skin (豆支), Yuri panko bread crumbs, tapioca starch, corn flour.

Preserved Vegetables & Sugar

Twin Rabbit china radish (菜脯碎), Sichuan pickled mustard greens (榨菜), rock sugar (冰糖), black/red sugar, maltose (麦芽糖), raw cane sugar, Ayam Brand sardines, fried dace (豆豉鲮鱼).

Don't see what you're looking for? We likely have it in stock.

Ask About Specific Products

Our Clientele

Trusted by Singapore's Finest

From neighbourhood coffee shops to five-star hotel kitchens, businesses across Singapore rely on Ah Yeow for their provision needs.

Our Delivery Fleet

Dependable Delivery,
Every Single Time

We operate our own in-house fleet to ensure your orders reach you on time, in full, and in perfect condition — consistently.

[ Delivery Fleet Photo ]
6
Delivery Vehicles
Mon–Sat
Delivery Days
Same-Day
Order Cut-Off*
All 28
Districts Covered

* Same-day delivery subject to order time and availability. Contact us for details.

In-House Fleet

Our own dedicated delivery vehicles — no third-party logistics, no middlemen. Every delivery is handled directly by our team.

Island-Wide Coverage

We deliver across all of Singapore — from the East Coast to the West, North to South, including industrial estates and city-centre kitchens.

Reliable Scheduling

Flexible delivery windows to suit your kitchen schedule. We work around your operations — not the other way around.

Careful Handling

Products are properly packed and secured for transit. Dry goods, delicate dried seafood, and fragile items arrive in perfect condition.

Ready to set up a regular delivery account for your business?

Arrange a Delivery
